reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención al público parece que vos le estás haciendo el favor para ir a cargar combustible  y si vas en moto ni te cuento el desastre

(Translated by Google)
Customer service is a disaster. It seems like you're doing them a favor by going to get gas, and if you're on a motorcycle, I can't even tell you about the disaster.
